message:
test(db): add cache benchmarks, golden tests, and evidence wiring tests

Concurrent agent additions to database layer testing:
- cache_bench.rs: benchmarks for cache performance characterization
- cache_golden.rs: golden path tests for cache correctness
- evidence_wiring.rs: integration tests for evidence ledger DB wiring

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
